Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

Class VersionProvider

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.VersionProvider
public class VersionProvider extends Object
Flavor-neutral version/build-metadata worker bean shared by the version @Rest flavors.

Holds the capability state (the assembled name/version/git*/buildTime/ javaVersion entry map) and the serve logic (write the map as readable JSON, format-pinned to application/json so the endpoint serves JSON even on a vanilla RestServlet host that hasn't wired up JSON serializers). The VersionMixin (mixin), VersionResource (child), and VersionServlet (servlet) flavors are independent @Rest classes that each hold a VersionProvider worker and delegate to it — so the three deployment forms cannot drift, and no flavor is another flavor's worker.

See Also:
  • VersionMixin
  • VersionResource
  • VersionServlet
  • REST Server — Composition (mixins, paths)
Since:
10.0.0

  • Field Details

    • UNKNOWN

      public static final String UNKNOWN
      Sentinel value returned for entries that the worker couldn't resolve.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • VersionProvider

      public VersionProvider()
      No-arg constructor — reads MANIFEST.MF, git.properties, and the JVM version from the framework classloader. Equivalent to create().build().

    • VersionProvider

      protected VersionProvider(VersionProvider.Builder builder)
      Builder constructor.

      Applies the default lookup chain (VersionProvider.Builder.fromManifest() + VersionProvider.Builder.fromGitProperties() + VersionProvider.Builder.fromJavaVersion()) when no other builder method has been called — ensuring that a freshly-created builder always produces a non-empty payload.

      Parameters:
      builder - The builder.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static VersionProvider.Builder create()
      Creates a new builder, with @Value-annotated fields populated through BeanInstantiator from the active Settings chain.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • create

      public static VersionProvider.Builder create(BeanStore beanStore)
      Creates a new builder using the supplied BeanStore for @Value-resolution and dependency injection.
      Parameters:
      beanStore - The bean store to use for dependency injection.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • serve

      public void serve(RestResponse res) throws IOException
      Serves the assembled metadata as a JSON map.

      Format-pinned to application/json — bypasses the host's content negotiation so the endpoint serves JSON even on a vanilla RestServlet host that hasn't wired up JSON serializers explicitly.

      Parameters:
      res - The current REST response.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing the response.

    • getInfoMap

      public Map<String,String> getInfoMap()
      Returns the configured info map (test/inspection helper).
      Returns:
      The info map.
